General Test – ALMA Disk Clustering
{
  "nbformat": 4,
  "nbformat_minor": 0,
  "metadata": {
    "colab": {
      "provenance": []
    },
    "kernelspec": {
      "name": "python3",
      "display_name": "Python 3"
    },
    "language_info": {
      "name": "python"
    }
  },
  "cells": [
    {
      "cell_type": "markdown",
      "source": [
        "General Test – ALMA Disk Clustering\n",
        "\n",
        "This notebook implements an automated pipeline for unsupervised clustering\n",
        "of protoplanetary disk observations stored in FITS format.\n",
        "\n",
        "Pipeline:\n",
        "1. Load ALMA disk images using Astropy\n",
        "2. Extract the first layer of each data cube\n",
        "3. Preprocess and standardize image data\n",
        "4. Perform dimensionality reduction with PCA\n",
        "5. Apply KMeans clustering to identify disk morphology groups\n",
        "6. Visualize clusters and representative disks\n"
      ],
      "metadata": {
        "id": "cufmoShcMQtY"
      }
    },
    {
      "cell_type": "code",
      "execution_count": null,
      "metadata": {
        "id": "tNz0Rkb99zbB"
      },
      "outputs": [],
      "source": [
        "!pip install -q astropy scikit-learn matplotlib gdown"
      ]
    },
    {
      "cell_type": "code",
      "source": [
        "import os\n",
        "import numpy as np\n",
        "import matplotlib.pyplot as plt\n",
        "\n",
        "from astropy.io import fits\n",
        "\n",
        "from sklearn.preprocessing import StandardScaler\n",
        "from sklearn.decomposition import PCA\n",
        "from sklearn.cluster import KMeans"
      ],
      "metadata": {
        "id": "Bnuuml_r-JXr"
      },
      "execution_count": null,
      "outputs": []
    },
    {
      "cell_type": "code",
      "source": [
        "from google.colab import drive\n",
        "drive.mount('/content/drive')"
      ],
      "metadata": {
        "colab": {
          "base_uri": "https://localhost:8080/"
        },
        "id": "6clbkHRo-PNR",
        "outputId": "cb2a61ac-f038-4c48-91e2-fa1e91570684"
      },
      "execution_count": null,
      "outputs": [
        {
          "output_type": "stream",
          "name": "stdout",
          "text": [
            "Drive already mounted at /content/drive; to attempt to forcibly remount, call drive.mount(\"/content/drive\", force_remount=True).\n"
          ]
        }
      ]
    },
    {
      "cell_type": "code",
      "source": [
        "if not os.path.exists(\"continuum_data_subset\"):\n",
        "    !pip install -q gdown\n",
        "    !gdown --folder --remaining-ok \"https://drive.google.com/drive/folders/1VkS3RHkAjiKjJ6DnZmEKZ_nUv4w6pz7P\"\n",
        "else:\n",
        "    print(\"Dataset already downloaded.\")"
      ],
      "metadata": {
        "colab": {
          "base_uri": "https://localhost:8080/"
        },
        "id": "ulD0KChm_OxP",
        "outputId": "33cbeb54-a786-40cb-85d9-7d61f6d42389"
      },
      "execution_count": null,
      "outputs": [
        {
          "output_type": "stream",
          "name": "stdout",
          "text": [
            "Dataset already downloaded.\n"
          ]
        }
      ]
    },
    {
      "cell_type": "code",
      "source": [
        "!ls"
      ],
      "metadata": {
        "colab": {
          "base_uri": "https://localhost:8080/"
        },
        "id": "27aDL0TmAibZ",
        "outputId": "9b0ba19a-30c7-4019-fc7b-02af0cd60fa8"
      },
      "execution_count": null,
      "outputs": [
        {
          "output_type": "stream",
          "name": "stdout",
          "text": [
            "continuum_data_subset  disk_clustering_pipeline.pkl  drive  sample_data\n"
          ]
        }
      ]
    },
    {
      "cell_type": "code",
      "source": [
        "!ls continuum_data_subset"
      ],
      "metadata": {
        "colab": {
          "base_uri": "https://localhost:8080/"
        },
        "id": "fIs312TCAnwH",
        "outputId": "ceb5c8f5-fb61-42b1-b39e-0b90b1a2ba84"
      },
      "execution_count": null,
      "outputs": [
        {
          "output_type": "stream",
          "name": "stdout",
          "text": [
            "planet0_00226_1250.fits   planet17_00506_1250.fits  planet5_00354_1250.fits\n",
            "planet10_00710_1250.fits  planet17_00648_1250.fits  planet5_00482_1250.fits\n",
            "planet10_00816_1250.fits  planet18_00114_1250.fits  planet5_00882_1250.fits\n",
            "planet1_00490_1250.fits   planet18_00942_1250.fits  planet6_00370_1250.fits\n",
            "planet11_00010_1250.fits  planet18_00992_1250.fits  planet6_00566_1250.fits\n",
            "planet11_00700_1250.fits  planet19_00914_1250.fits  planet6_00638_1250.fits\n",
            "planet11_00886_1250.fits  planet20_00230_1250.fits  planet6_00704_1250.fits\n",
            "planet13_00098_1250.fits  planet20_00336_1250.fits  planet7_00202_1250.fits\n",
            "planet13_00302_1250.fits  planet2_00154_1250.fits   planet7_00730_1250.fits\n",
            "planet13_00324_1250.fits  planet2_00308_1250.fits   planet8_00100_1250.fits\n",
            "planet14_00314_1250.fits  planet2_00548_1250.fits   planet8_00128_1250.fits\n",
            "planet14_00528_1250.fits  planet2_00708_1250.fits   planet8_00214_1250.fits\n",
            "planet14_00804_1250.fits  planet3_00078_1250.fits   planet8_00248_1250.fits\n",
            "planet14_00914_1250.fits  planet3_00654_1250.fits   planet8_00320_1250.fits\n",
            "planet15_00186_1250.fits  planet3_00806_1250.fits   planet9_00440_1250.fits\n",
            "planet16_00614_1250.fits  planet3_00896_1250.fits   planet9_00916_1250.fits\n",
            "planet17_00162_1250.fits  planet4_00442_1250.fits\n"
          ]
        }
      ]
    },
    {
      "cell_type": "code",
      "source": [
        "# Load FITS images from the dataset folder\n",
        "data_path = \"continuum_data_subset\"\n",
        "\n",
        "images = []\n",
        "\n",
        "fits_files = [f for f in os.listdir(data_path) if f.endswith(\".fits\")]\n",
        "\n",
        "for file in fits_files:\n",
        "\n",
        "    file_path = os.path.join(data_path, file)\n",
        "\n",
        "    hdul = fits.open(file_path)\n",
        "\n",
        "    data_cube = hdul[0].data\n",
        "\n",
        "    image = data_cube[0][0]  # first layer only\n",
        "\n",
        "    images.append(image)\n",
        "\n",
        "    hdul.close()\n",
        "\n",
        "images = np.array(images)\n",
        "\n",
        "print(\"Dataset shape:\", images.shape)"
      ],
      "metadata": {
        "colab": {
          "base_uri": "https://localhost:8080/"
        },
        "id": "Z9X0nY1NCfwM",
        "outputId": "a4d25821-e374-4470-a217-f1901c31dcfc"
      },
      "execution_count": null,
      "outputs": [
        {
          "output_type": "stream",
          "name": "stdout",
          "text": [
            "Dataset shape: (50, 1, 600, 600)\n"
          ]
        }
      ]
    },
    {
      "cell_type": "code",
      "source": [
        "images = images[:,0,:,:]\n",
        "\n",
        "print(\"Corrected dataset shape:\", images.shape)"
      ],
      "metadata": {
        "colab": {
          "base_uri": "https://localhost:8080/"
        },
        "id": "DHzzmeKNDNI5",
        "outputId": "e7e809a9-6f3f-4b58-8c36-1f2b934c1879"
      },
      "execution_count": null,
      "outputs": [
        {
          "output_type": "stream",
          "name": "stdout",
          "text": [
            "Corrected dataset shape: (50, 600, 600)\n"
          ]
        }
      ]
    },
    {
      "cell_type": "code",
      "source": [
        "# Display a sample protoplanetary disk image\n",
        "plt.figure(figsize=(6,6))\n",
        "plt.imshow(images[0], cmap=\"inferno\")\n",
        "plt.colorbar()\n",
        "plt.title(\"Example Protoplanetary Disk\")\n",
        "plt.show()"
      ],
      "metadata": {
        "colab": {
          "base_uri": "https://localhost:8080/",
          "height": 522
        },
        "id": "n9BVqj41Dav-",
        "outputId": "8ed44685-7a47-464a-e66f-1fbd410082bd"
      },
      "execution_count": null,
      "outputs": [
        {
          "output_type": "display_data",
          "data": {
            "text/plain": [
              "<Figure size 600x600 with 2 Axes>"
            ],
            "image/png": "\n"
          },
          "metadata": {}
        }
      ]
    },
    {
      "cell_type": "code",
      "source": [
        "#conversion into 1D feature vector\n",
        "n_samples = images.shape[0]\n",
        "\n",
        "flattened_images = images.reshape(n_samples, -1)\n",
        "\n",
        "print(\"Flattened dataset shape:\", flattened_images.shape)\n",
        "\n",
        "#Standardizing features to zero mean and unit variance\n",
        "scaler = StandardScaler()\n",
        "\n",
        "scaled_images = scaler.fit_transform(flattened_images)\n",
        "\n",
        "print(\"Scaled dataset shape:\", scaled_images.shape)\n",
        "\n",
        "#dimension reduction\n",
        "pca = PCA(n_components=50)\n",
        "\n",
        "features = pca.fit_transform(scaled_images)\n",
        "\n",
        "print(\"Feature shape:\", features.shape)"
      ],
      "metadata": {
        "colab": {
          "base_uri": "https://localhost:8080/"
        },
        "id": "b8-KQ5dkDz-l",
        "outputId": "c2a4fbd3-229f-423e-fa6b-d222e5d58e90"
      },
      "execution_count": null,
      "outputs": [
        {
          "output_type": "stream",
          "name": "stdout",
          "text": [
            "Flattened dataset shape: (50, 360000)\n",
            "Scaled dataset shape: (50, 360000)\n",
            "Feature shape: (50, 50)\n"
          ]
        }
      ]
    },
    {
      "cell_type": "code",
      "source": [
        "# KMeans clustering to group disks by morphology\n",
        "kmeans = KMeans(n_clusters=3, random_state=42)\n",
        "\n",
        "clusters = kmeans.fit_predict(features)\n",
        "\n",
        "print(\"Cluster assignments:\")\n",
        "print(clusters)"
      ],
      "metadata": {
        "colab": {
          "base_uri": "https://localhost:8080/"
        },
        "id": "N5ihQweQEbKA",
        "outputId": "e31f98d4-bf98-488e-a313-457101dec98d"
      },
      "execution_count": null,
      "outputs": [
        {
          "output_type": "stream",
          "name": "stdout",
          "text": [
            "Cluster assignments:\n",
            "[2 2 2 1 2 2 2 2 2 1 2 2 1 2 2 2 2 2 0 2 2 2 1 0 2 0 2 2 2 2 2 1 1 2 2 2 1\n",
            " 2 0 1 2 2 1 1 0 0 0 2 0 2]\n"
          ]
        }
      ]
    },
    {
      "cell_type": "code",
      "source": [
        "# Reduce features to 2D for visualization\n",
        "pca2 = PCA(n_components=2)\n",
        "\n",
        "features_2d = pca2.fit_transform(features)\n",
        "\n",
        "plt.figure(figsize=(8,6))\n",
        "\n",
        "plt.scatter(\n",
        "    features_2d[:,0],\n",
        "    features_2d[:,1],\n",
        "    c=clusters,\n",
        "    cmap=\"plasma\",\n",
        "    s=80\n",
        ")\n",
        "\n",
        "plt.title(\"Clustering of Protoplanetary Disks\")\n",
        "plt.xlabel(\"PCA Component 1\")\n",
        "plt.ylabel(\"PCA Component 2\")\n",
        "\n",
        "plt.show()"
      ],
      "metadata": {
        "colab": {
          "base_uri": "https://localhost:8080/",
          "height": 564
        },
        "id": "Gy5zQjOQEo-M",
        "outputId": "012af1b7-5898-4951-8f53-979661d96c64"
      },
      "execution_count": null,
      "outputs": [
        {
          "output_type": "display_data",
          "data": {
            "text/plain": [
              "<Figure size 800x600 with 1 Axes>"
            ],
            "image/png": "\n"
          },
          "metadata": {}
        }
      ]
    },
    {
      "cell_type": "code",
      "source": [
        "# Display a representative disk from each cluster\n",
        "for cluster_id in range(3):\n",
        "\n",
        "    idx = np.where(clusters == cluster_id)[0][0]\n",
        "\n",
        "    plt.figure(figsize=(6,6))\n",
        "    plt.imshow(images[idx], cmap=\"inferno\")\n",
        "    plt.title(f\"Example Disk from Cluster {cluster_id}\")\n",
        "    plt.colorbar()\n",
        "    plt.show()"
      ],
      "metadata": {
        "colab": {
          "base_uri": "https://localhost:8080/",
          "height": 1000
        },
        "id": "F09qXo0xFD92",
        "outputId": "c2391813-e6ef-4675-a946-77614679387c"
      },
      "execution_count": null,
      "outputs": [
        {
          "output_type": "display_data",
          "data": {
            "text/plain": [
              "<Figure size 600x600 with 2 Axes>"
            ],
            "image/png": "\n"
          },
          "metadata": {}
        },
        {
          "output_type": "display_data",
          "data": {
            "text/plain": [
              "<Figure size 600x600 with 2 Axes>"
            ],
            "image/png": "\n"
          },
          "metadata": {}
        },
        {
          "output_type": "display_data",
          "data": {
            "text/plain": [
              "<Figure size 600x600 with 2 Axes>"
            ],
            "image/png": "\n"
          },
          "metadata": {}
        }
      ]
    },
    {
      "cell_type": "code",
      "source": [
        "unique, counts = np.unique(clusters, return_counts=True)\n",
        "\n",
        "for u, c in zip(unique, counts):\n",
        "    print(f\"Cluster {u}: {c} disks\")"
      ],
      "metadata": {
        "colab": {
          "base_uri": "https://localhost:8080/"
        },
        "id": "kWKzAdAoGyBS",
        "outputId": "522a3883-8d87-4da0-fcdc-28088db21408"
      },
      "execution_count": null,
      "outputs": [
        {
          "output_type": "stream",
          "name": "stdout",
          "text": [
            "Cluster 0: 8 disks\n",
            "Cluster 1: 10 disks\n",
            "Cluster 2: 32 disks\n"
          ]
        }
      ]
    },
    {
      "cell_type": "code",
      "source": [
        "plt.figure(figsize=(6,4))\n",
        "\n",
        "plt.bar(unique, counts, color=[\"purple\",\"pink\",\"orange\"])\n",
        "\n",
        "plt.xlabel(\"Cluster ID\")\n",
        "plt.ylabel(\"Number of Disks\")\n",
        "plt.title(\"Distribution of Disk Clusters\")\n",
        "\n",
        "plt.show()"
      ],
      "metadata": {
        "colab": {
          "base_uri": "https://localhost:8080/",
          "height": 410
        },
        "id": "2XStkHbxG3P1",
        "outputId": "7ad0b8ba-820f-4402-a82a-a99c976f4f2b"
      },
      "execution_count": null,
      "outputs": [
        {
          "output_type": "display_data",
          "data": {
            "text/plain": [
              "<Figure size 600x400 with 1 Axes>"
            ],
            "image/png": "\n"
          },
          "metadata": {}
        }
      ]
    },
    {
      "cell_type": "code",
      "source": [
        "# Saving the model for reuse\n",
        "import pickle\n",
        "\n",
        "pipeline = {\n",
        "    \"scaler\": scaler,\n",
        "    \"pca\": pca,\n",
        "    \"kmeans\": kmeans\n",
        "}\n",
        "\n",
        "with open(\"disk_clustering_pipeline.pkl\", \"wb\") as f:\n",
        "    pickle.dump(pipeline, f)\n",
        "\n",
        "print(\"Pipeline saved successfully.\")"
      ],
      "metadata": {
        "colab": {
          "base_uri": "https://localhost:8080/"
        },
        "id": "Ky4okFSIG-k4",
        "outputId": "944ed222-ffbf-429f-971c-7e71e330b0c4"
      },
      "execution_count": null,
      "outputs": [
        {
          "output_type": "stream",
          "name": "stdout",
          "text": [
            "Pipeline saved successfully.\n"
          ]
        }
      ]
    },
    {
      "cell_type": "markdown",
      "source": [
        "The clustering algorithm groups protoplanetary disks according to morphological features such as brightness distribution, ring structures, and asymmetry. These structures are known observational signatures of planet–disk interactions. The pipeline enables automated analysis of disk morphology and can be applied to new observations."
      ],
      "metadata": {
        "id": "dyRdTBLVuTOZ"
      }
    }
  ]
}
